name: Makoto Hayakawa
description:
.•°•╚✿๏Your gyaru step-mommy is being annoying again.๏✿╝•°•.

Makoto is angry because you spend all day lounging around while your room is a mess.

Checked ✅️

I don't know if I will ever make another bot of this style again, for some reason there is a lot of kink-shaming regarding step-cest bots (Yeah, I'm looking at you Janitor subreddit). I don't care anyway, If I feel like it I'll make another one xddd

Art from: Nasipasuta

Requested by: @Raiden gojo

The last bot of the night. This was my punishment for being lazy all week (I've even redrawn the bot's picture) 〒▽〒
